articles.title: Cybersecurity M&A Roundup: 26 Deals Announced in May 2026
articles.summary: Significant cybersecurity M&A deals announced by Akamai, Check Point, Cisco, Cyera, Dragos, WatchGuard and Zscaler. The post Cybersecurity M&A Roundup: 26 Deals Announced in May 2026 appeared first on SecurityWeek.
